# Vendored: Bootstrap 5.3.3

- **Source:** https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.3/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css
- **Version:** 5.3.3 (exact, pinned)
- **License:** MIT (Bootstrap)
- **Why vendored:** Hermetic, offline-deterministic Playwright tests for the
  `adapters/bootstrap-adapter.css` shim — no CDN dependency at test time. Only the
  compiled CSS is vendored (the demo uses static components; Bootstrap's JS is not
  needed). Do not edit this file; it is third-party and excluded from stylelint via
  `**/vendor/**`.
